activities_projects.title: Minerals in Everyday Products
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how minerals are used in common household products
steps: Select five household products (toothpaste, utensils, electronics etc.)
Identify the minerals used in making them
Explain the function of each mineral in the product

activities_projects.title: Mineral Classification Table
steps: Create a table with three columns: Ferrous, Non-ferrous and Non-metallic minerals
List at least three examples under each category
Write one industrial use for each mineral

activities_projects.title: Mode of Occurrence Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how minerals occur in different geological formations
steps: Describe five modes of mineral occurrence
Give one example mineral for each mode
Explain why these formations affect mining methods
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands geological processes affecting mineral formation
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Iron Ore Belt Mapping
activities_projects.objective: Study the distribution of iron ore in India
steps: Mark Odisha-Jharkhand belt
Mark Durg-Bastar-Chandrapur belt
Mark Ballari-Chitradurga belt and Maharashtra-Goa belt
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands spatial distribution of mineral resources

activities_projects.title: Mining Impact Study
steps: List three environmental impacts of mining
Describe two health hazards faced by miners
Suggest two measures to reduce these problems

activities_projects.title: Energy Source Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare conventional and non-conventional energy sources
steps: Create a comparison table
Write advantages and disadvantages of each type
Provide examples used in India

activities_projects.title: Coal Formation Explanation
activities_projects.objective: Understand the process of coal formation
steps: Explain the stages of coal formation
List the four types of coal
Draw a simple diagram showing the formation process
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands geological processes of fossil fuels

activities_projects.title: Petroleum Distribution Study
activities_projects.objective: Examine petroleum producing regions in India
steps: Locate Mumbai High, Gujarat and Assam
Write one oil field from each region
Explain why petroleum is important for industries
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct map work and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Renewable Energy Research
activities_projects.objective: Investigate renewable energy sources in India
steps: Research solar, wind and biogas energy
Explain how each generates energy
Identify one major location in India for each source

activities_projects.title: Energy Conservation Plan
steps: List five ways to conserve energy at home
List three ways to conserve energy at school
Explain why energy conservation is important for the future
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Encourages responsible use of energy resources
